libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime on JDK 25/current-defaults, ensure the generated test setup passes runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for version 5.0.1 as well. Meaningful WebClient coverage can use an in-process `Vertx` `HttpServer` on `127.0.0.1` with random port; no external HTTP service is required. Close `WebClient`, `HttpServer`, and `Vertx` in cleanup to avoid async hangs.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If tests choose to cover `OAuth2WebClient`, the artifact declares `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2` as optional, so that path would require an additional test dependency; it is not needed for core WebClient, sessions, caching, redirects, forms, multipart, or body codec coverage.
Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative for whether the Netty runtime properties fully address the reported native run failure.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 is usable with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server and needs no extra Maven dependency or Docker service, but it resolves Vert.x 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final and native Java 25 runs need the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already used for 5.0.0.
